title: Watch: Largest residential fire in Norway's modern history destroys at least 100 homes
summary_full: A massive fire destroyed at least one hundred homes in Drammen, Norway. Hundreds of residents were forced to evacuate their residences after the blaze spread rapidly. Firefighters worked through Saturday to bring the extensive fire under control. Helicopters were deployed to assist in dousing the flames with water. The cause of this historic residential fire remains under investigation.
